ILK-BLASZCZAK

Label the following structures in the sagittal view of the upper respiratory system. (1 point) HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 85

86 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB ACTIVITIES A list of words is provided below that you are expected to learn and label on the models provided. Note that not all models will have some of the organs/structures, so be sure to find them on an alternate model. You must use all the words provided. Using the colored tape provided, write the number that corresponds to the organ/structure and place it on your model. When complete, notify your TA so they may check your work. For each additional station, directions will be provided for the activity. STATION ONE: UPPER RESPIRATORY Label the models of this station with the number that corresponds to the appropriate s
